name: devexp
description: Codex plugin for engineering experience records with the devexp CLI installer.

interface.shortDescription: Capture project decisions, issues, and reviews.
interface.longDescription: DevExp helps Codex maintain lightweight engineering experience archives in real project directories. It bundles the Record Engineering Experience Skill and a script that installs the devexp CLI into PATH for direct project usage.
defaultPrompt: Install the devexp CLI into PATH.
Initialize devexp records for this project.
Create an ADR for this engineering decision.
